mapper.insert: insert into hybridanalysis.source_folders(user_id, zip_name, zip_path, create_time, update_time, dir_path, unpack_path) VALUES (#{userId}, #{zipName}, #{zipPath}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{dirPath}, #{unpackPath})
mapper.select: select id, user_id, zip_name, zip_path, create_time, update_time, dir_path, unpack_path from hybridanalysis.source_folders where id = #{sourceFolderId}
